sn22.65:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Then a certain bhikkhu approached the Blessed One … and said to him:
sn22.65:1.2: "Venerable sir, it would be good if the Blessed One would teach me the Dhamma in brief … ."
sn22.65:1.3: "Bhikkhu, in seeking delight one is bound by Māra; by not seeking delight one is freed from the Evil One."
sn22.65:2.1: "In what way, bhikkhu, do you understand in detail the meaning of what was stated by me in brief?"
sn22.65:2.2: "In seeking delight in form, venerable sir, one is bound by Māra; by not seeking delight in it one is freed from the Evil One. In seeking delight in feeling … in perception … in volitional formations … in consciousness one is bound by Māra; by not seeking delight in it one is freed from the Evil One. sn.iii.76
sn22.65:2.3: "It is in such a way, venerable sir, that I understand in detail the meaning of what was stated by the Blessed One in brief."
sn22.65:3.1: "Good, good, bhikkhu! It is good that you understand in detail the meaning of what was stated by me in brief. In seeking delight in form, bhikkhu, one is bound by Māra … as above in full … by not seeking delight in it one is freed from the Evil One. It is in such a way that the meaning of what was stated by me in brief should be understood in detail."
sn22.65:3.2: … And that bhikkhu became one of the arahants.
